query:
now reviewing the fuller design: Vision alignment is clean — no FAIL, no variances — but there's one WARN-01 that needs your decision
  before I can send artifacts to the synthesizer:                                                      
                                                                                                       
  ---                                                                                                  
  WARN-01 — RayonPool offload branch: scoped vs. deferred                                              
                                                                                                       
  The SCOPE.md says the Rayon offload path is explicitly out of scope. The architect and risk          
  strategist both scoped it in for crt-030, with R-01 (Critical) requiring test coverage for both the  
  inline and offload branches.                                                                         
                                                                                                       
  Option A — Keep it in crt-030: Add an AC for the PPR_RAYON_OFFLOAD_THRESHOLD constant and the offload
   branch. R-01 is satisfied.
                                                                                                       
  Option B — Defer it: Remove the offload branch from crt-030. Reclassify R-01 from Critical to        
  deferred in the risk strategy. Implementation only does the inline path now.
                                                                                                       
  Which option?

entries.title: Optional future branch in architecture must match scope intent — WARN if architecture and risk diverge from scope deferral
ADR-008: Step 6d Latency Budget and RayonPool Offload (DEFERRED) — crt-030
Shared rayon pool monopolisation by long-running background scans
Regression test pattern for rayon-dispatched functions: RayonError::Cancelled as panic probe
